zh.Bradwell, Essex, England: 英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞
zh.Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England: 英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare於1250年出生在英國素瑞阿申亞德時，他的父親Matthew de la Mare40歲，母親Florence de Akeni40歲。他於1276年與Petronilla Dunstanville在英國素瑞阿申亞德結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1313年10月18日在英國艾可布拉德維爾--希亞享年63歲。

zh-hans.Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England: 英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare于1250年出生在英国素瑞阿申亞德时，他的父亲Matthew de la Mare40岁，母亲Florence de Akeni40岁。他于1276年与Petronilla Dunstanville在英国素瑞阿申亞德结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1313年10月18日在英国艾可布拉德維爾--希亞享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

English: variant of   Mear  .

variants.name: Marucci

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare was born in 1250, in Ashtead, Surrey, England, his father, Matthew de la Mare, was 40 and his mother, Florence de Akeni, was 40. He married Petronilla Dunstanville in 1276, in Ashtead, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 18 October 1313, in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare est né en 1250, à Ashtead, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Matthew de la Mare, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Florence de Akeni, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Petronilla Dunstanville en 1276, à Ashtead, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1313, à Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare 1250 in Ashtead, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Matthew de la Mare 40 und seine Mutter Florence de Akeni 40. Er hat 1276 in Ashtead, Surrey, England Petronilla Dunstanville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1313 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare è nato il nel 1250 nel Ashtead, Surrey, England, il suo padre, Matthew de la Mare, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Florence de Akeni, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Petronilla Dunstanville nel 1276, nel Ashtead, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 18 ottobre 1313, nel Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, England, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mareが1250年にイギリススリーアシュテアドで生まれた時，父Matthew de la Mareは40歳，母Florence de Akeniは40歳であった。1276年にイギリススリーアシュテアドでPetronilla Dunstanvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1313年10月18日にイギリスエセックスブラドウエル-オン-セアで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare(이)가 1250년 영국 수리 애슈테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matthew de la Mare(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Florence de Akeni(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1276년 영국 수리 애슈테아드에서 Petronilla Dunstanville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1313년 10월 18일 영국 에세스 브라드웰--시에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare nasceu em 1250, em Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew de la Mare, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Florence de Akeni, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Petronilla Dunstanville em 1276, em Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1313, em Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare родился в 1250 г. в местности аштид, сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Matthew de la Mare было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence de Akeni, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Petronilla Dunstanville в 1276 г. в местности аштид, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 18 октября 1313 г. в местности брадвелл-он-сеа, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de la Mare 1st Baron de la Mare nació en 1250, en Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew de la Mare, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Florence de Akeni, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Petronilla Dunstanville en 1276, en Ashtead, Surrey, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1313, en Bradwell-on-Sea, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 63 años.
